description: Seven-year backtest of the NP+DI filter against the enterprise Spring Boot manifest (54 packages including the script's 48 + log4j-core, log4j-api, xstream, and the activemq trio for fidelity with the doc's broader manifest). All Critical/High vulnerabilities published 2018-01 through 2026-06 are recorded with their CWE classification, NP+DI classifier output, and CISA KEV outcome flag. Deduped by CVE.

methodology.scope: Spring Boot enterprise manifest, 54 Maven packages
methodology.np_filter: CWE present in PARSING_CWES set (29 CWEs)
methodology.di_filter: CWE present in DI_CWES set (32 CWEs)
methodology.note_on_kev_only: in_kev tracks ONLY CISA KEV. The companion periodicity page also considers Metasploit/ExploitDB exploitation evidence (e.g. CVE-2019-0232 Tomcat CGI is in this dataset, classifier says NP+DI, but is exploited per Metasploit, not yet in CISA KEV).
methodology.manifest_source: analysis-scripts/spring_manifest_analysis.py (48 pkgs) + 6 added to align with the doc's 7-year backtest finding 8 in-scope exploited CVEs (log4j-core, log4j-api, xstream, activemq-{core,broker,client})
